title: asperula cynanchica subsp. paui
intro: Asperula cynanchica subsp. paui is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Paui's woodruff or mountain woodruff. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asperula cynanchica subsp. paui include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some traditional remedies also using the plant's leaves and flowers to create topical applications for skin issues.
